query:
UPDATE agents
             SET `name` = ?, description = ?, system_prompt_extensions = ?,
                 model_preference = ?, verification_command = ?,
                 mcp_servers = ?, skills = ?, learned_prompt = ?,
                 updated_at = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ')
             WHERE id = ?
